purpose: Tiny one-dot indicator showing the SSE / IPC connection state. Green (--color-completed) when connected, red (--color-failed) otherwise. Title and aria-label switch between 'Connected' and 'Disconnected'. Trivially stateless, used in the header.
gotchas: Reads `--color-completed` / `--color-failed` from CSS variables — relies on the global theme being loaded; in test harnesses without those vars the dot will be invisible.
patterns: Pure presentational; computes color string inline from a ternary.
